title: Mariánské Lázně, Karlovy Vary — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Mariánské Lázně is a city in Karlovy Vary with a population of 13,000. A picturesque spa town in West Bohemia, famous for its elegant colonnades, mineral springs, and beautifully landscaped park gardens.
